creator: dasebek@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #4)
Given that the improvements added by the patch D31121 are disabled by default, I think that patch D30828 is still relevant. The latest 14-CURRENT build fails to boot on my laptop unless copy_staging is manually disabled.

Moreover, the patch D30828 adds some missing return value checks and warns if it detects a buffer overflow or if the boot loader accesses a reserved memory range.

However, the patch will need some improvements. I found that it does not detect a scenario when a loaded kernel module (such as an image created by mfsbsd) is larger than the staging area size (64 megabytes).
